channel.title: API Deprecation | RSS
channel.description: This feed lists the API capabilities that are, or will soon be, deprecated

item.title: Trading API
item.notes: The listed calls have been deprecated and will be decommissioned on January 19th, 2027. Current users are recommended to migrate to the Combined Shipping Rules methods of the Account API v2.

item.title: Trading API
item.notes: This notification is triggered when a seller manually marks an item as paid, so sending a notification related to an action the seller just took is redundant.

item.title: Product API
item.notes: The listed calls in the Product API have been deprecated and will be decommissioned on August 15th, 2026. Current users of this API are recommended to migrate to the Catalog API.
